svg.title: KidneyHub Microservice Architecture
svg.desc: Arsitektur microservice KidneyHub dengan 13 container: Traefik, Web, Auth, Donor, Notification, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Mosquitto, Prometheus, Grafana, Node Exporter, cAdvisor
svg.text: 13 Containers · Traefik API Gateway · REST API + WebSocket + MQTT · Prometheus + Grafana Monitoring
CPU, RAM, disk I/O, network metrics
